review_evidence.summary: Build passes. Column order in DB is correct: Intake (pos 0), Blocked (pos 1), Backlog (pos 2). API returns columns ordered by position. The code correctly uses `ORDER BY position` when fetching columns, so the UI will render Intake and Blocked before Backlog as requested. PR #5 is merged.
